style_prefix: Premium Korean drama cinematography, cinematic realism, natural skin texture, soft film grain, dramatic practical lighting, shallow depth of field, 16:9 widescreen composition.

protagonist.default: [Base appearance — ethnicity, age, face shape, eye shape, cheekbones, skin tone, build, height]
protagonist.timeline_a: [Timeline A — same base features + specific outfit, hairstyle, accessories, expression]
protagonist.timeline_b: [Timeline B — same base features + different outfit, hairstyle for different era/mood]

images.prompt_en: [Scene/background description ONLY — character appearance is auto-injected from character_lock]
images.video_prompt: [Camera movement and action description for video generation]
